training.loss_notes: default CrossEntropyLoss over flattened target-gene classes

artifact_usage_claims.usage: loads real official STRING keep20 graph TSV and constructs top-K target-gene neighborhoods from aligned Ensembl IDs; missing targets receive self-loop only
preserves official K562 DEG task target order and label semantics

pipeline_program.representation: official K562 AIDO+GNN cached features inherited from parent
pipeline_program.target_side: official target genes aligned to STRING Ensembl IDs
pipeline_program.head: dense DEG head followed by graph-neighborhood attention
pipeline_program.paper_alignment: planned STRING neighborhood attention over source-backed graph artifact; no fabricated edges or STRING_GNN model-dir substitute
